name: Mocha Chocolate Chip Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush graham cracker cereal and set aside.
2. Combine chocolate chips into two separate bowls; refrigerate until ready to use.
3. Melt butter and let cool to room temperature.
4. Prepare gelatin according to package instructions.
5. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth.
6. Add sweetened condensed milk and beat until combined.
7. Fold in whipped heavy cream and chocolate chips.
8. Pour batter into prepared crust and sprinkle with reserved chocolate chips.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour or until set.
10. Let cool before refrigerating.
